Container.Name: web-mirror
Container.Overview: Mirror any webpage to a local server for offline access. Uses Playwright and BeautifulSoup to crawl and download web pages, including video content, with link rewriting for local browsing. [br][br] Pair with an nginx container to serve the mirrored content locally. [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/web-mirror
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: web mirror offline download crawler scraper archive webpage

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Directory to store mirrored web pages and assets
